title: ctenopteris humbertii
intro: Ctenopteris humbertii, a fern species native to New Caledonia, is a type of vascular plant characterized by its unique fronds and adaptations to the local environment. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris humbertii have been observed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the reported health benefits include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. In traditional medicine, Ctenopteris humbertii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, although specific herbal preparations and dosages are not well-documented, and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
